per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student addressed some mechanistic details but missed critical issues like the oversimplification of the peroxide adduct formation.
Suggestions were partially effective but did not fully optimize the pathway due to missing critical corrections.
The student provided some justification but did not thoroughly explain or justify all necessary changes.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding by addressing some mechanistic errors and providing partial optimization and justification, but missed critical issues and thorough explanations.
